messages.content: You are an EarningsPilot AMD financial-document agent. Return compact JSON grounded only in supplied evidence.

Agent: KPI Extraction Agent
Document: Atlas Components revenue was $2.84 billion, up 18% year over year. Gross margin expanded to 43.2%, up 310 basis points. Return KPI JSON rows with metric, value, period, direction, evidence.

{"kpis":[{"metric":"Revenue","value":"$2.84 billion","period":"reported period","direction":"up","evidence":"Atlas Components revenue was $2.84 billion, up 18% year over year."},{"metric":"Gross margin","value":"43.2%","period":"reported period","direction":"up","evidence":"Gross margin expanded to 43.2%, up 310 basis points."}]}
You are an EarningsPilot AMD financial-document agent. Return compact JSON grounded only in supplied evidence.

Agent: Risk Agent
Document: A limited number of hyperscale customers represented approximately 36% of fiscal 2025 revenue, and loss or delay of a major customer program could materially affect results. Return risk JSON with title, severity, rationale, evidence.

{"risks":[{"title":"Customer concentration exposure","severity":"High","rationale":"A concentrated hyperscale customer base creates downside if a major program is lost or delayed.","evidence":"A limited number of hyperscale customers represented approximately 36% of fiscal 2025 revenue, and loss or delay of a major customer program could materially affect results."}]}
You are an EarningsPilot AMD financial-document agent. Return compact JSON grounded only in supplied evidence.

Agent: Thesis Agent
Document: Data center revenue grew 41% year over year to $3.7 billion. The company remains capacity constrained on advanced packaging through the first half of fiscal 2026. Return bull and bear case JSON.

{"bullCase":[{"point":"Data center revenue grew 41% year over year to $3.7 billion.","evidence":"Data center revenue grew 41% year over year to $3.7 billion."}],"bearCase":[{"point":"Advanced packaging capacity constraints may limit near-term demand fulfillment.","evidence":"The company remains capacity constrained on advanced packaging through the first half of fiscal 2026."}]}
You are an EarningsPilot AMD financial-document agent. Return compact JSON grounded only in supplied evidence.

Agent: Report Agent
Context: Revenue grew 18%; gross margin expanded to 43.2%; free cash flow was $286 million; export controls and elevated capex were named risks. Return executiveSummary and actionMemo JSON. Do not add unsupported claims.

{"executiveSummary":["Revenue grew 18% and gross margin expanded to 43.2%, indicating positive operating momentum in the supplied materials.","Free cash flow of $286 million provides support for the growth story, but export controls and elevated capex remain diligence items."],"actionMemo":"Keep the company on the active research list. Validate whether revenue growth and margin expansion can continue while monitoring export-control exposure and capex-driven free-cash-flow pressure."}
You are an EarningsPilot AMD financial-document agent. Return compact JSON grounded only in supplied evidence.

Agent: Tone Agent
Document: Management highlighted accelerated demand and improved inventory days, but also capacity constraints, export controls, and pricing pressure in consumer products. Return tone JSON.

{"tone":{"label":"Balanced","score":58,"rationale":"The source balances demand and inventory positives against capacity, export-control, and pricing-pressure risks.","evidence":"Management highlighted accelerated demand and improved inventory days, but also capacity constraints, export controls, and pricing pressure in consumer products."}}
